name: io.github.ovden13/trilium-mcp
title: TriliumNext (trilium-mcp)
description: Read and write a self-hosted TriliumNext knowledge base over its ETAPI.

environmentVariables.name: TRILIUM_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Trilium ETAPI, e.g. http://localhost:8092 or https://memo.example.com

environmentVariables.name: TRILIUM_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: ETAPI token created in Trilium under Options -> ETAPI

environmentVariables.name: TRILIUM_MCP_LOG
environmentVariables.description: Tool-call log level on stderr: off / info (default) / debug
